basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced the Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026 with openings for eligible candidates. The detailed notification has been published under Advt No. OS-A/61/2026 on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 33 years and hold a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering can participate in the Walk-in Interview on 24 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Upto 33 years (may be relaxed on experience basis).

qualification.details: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (3 years after SSC or 2 years after HSC) with minimum 50% marks. 3 years' experience in maintaining large business complex, malls, institutions, hotels, hospitals. Familiar with HVAC, pumping, firefighting and all kinds of mechanical installations and maintenance in such organizations. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 to 40,000/- p.m. (on the basis of Experience over and above the specified eligibility criteria).

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (3 years after SSC or 2 years after HSC) with minimum 50% marks. 3 years' experience in maintaining large business complex, malls, institutions, hotels, hospitals. Familiar with HVAC, pumping, firefighting and all kinds of mechanical installations and maintenance in such organizations. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Age Limit
content_sections.text: Upto 33 years (may be relaxed on experience basis).

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Salary
content_sections.text: Consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 to 40,000/- p.m. (on the basis of Experience over and above the specified eligibility criteria).

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for ACTREC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Jr. Engineer (Mechanical).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: A Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with a minimum of 50% marks is required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, 3 years of experience in maintaining large business complexes, malls, institutions, hotels, or hospitals is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Jr. Engineer (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: The age limit is up to 33 years, with potential relaxation based on experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered is between Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Ground Floor, Pushp Building, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, scanned copies of Aadhar Card, PAN CARD, ORIGINAL and Self Attested copies of qualification mark sheet, certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
